description: The GYM seismological monitoring center needs to audit its instrument sensitivities. Extract the sensor gain and gain frequency for all 'BHZ' channels from the SeisComP inventory (connection: mysql://sysop:sysop@localhost/seiscomp or inventory XML). Save the data to /home/ga/bhz_gains.csv using the exact header: Network,Station,Location,Channel,Gain,GainFrequency. Ensure all 'BHZ' channels are represented.
